candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Section header, not the reported total; less preferred than explicit total line.
Only a component of current assets, not the full total.
Only a component/header, not total current assets.

candidates.row_label: Working Capital excluding Other Current Assets & Liabilities
candidates.why: Derived metric, not total current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line; preferred over broader cash plus investments labels.
Also a direct cash and cash equivalents label, likely supplemental/alternate presentation.
Too broad because it includes short-term investments.
Too broad because it includes short-term investments.

variables.notes: Priority list uses pure cash-equivalents labels first; broader cash-plus-investments labels excluded.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Section header, not the reported total; less preferred than explicit total line.
Only a component of current liabilities, not the full total.
Only a component of current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt
candidates.why: Clean total for short-term debt including current portion of long-term debt; preferred single-line STD measure.
Component of current debt; incomplete if a broader total current debt line exists.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt including Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Current maturities component, but includes leases and would overlap with the clean total line if both selected.

final_choice.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt

variables.notes: Chose the clean total current debt line per STD rule. It is preferred over combining components. Although a separate current portion line mentions capitalized leases, no lease-free decomposition of the total is available, so the clean reported total is used.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current income tax liability on the balance sheet.
Includes non-current and current amounts together; less precise than short-term payable.

variables.notes: Chosen outside shortlist; confident because it directly identifies current taxes payable.

candidates.why: Direct total PPE balance-sheet line; preferred because target asks to prefer total/net PPE.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - excluding Assets Leased Out - Net - Total
candidates.why: Also total net PPE, but modified/excluding leased-out assets; less standard than the main total.
Gross PPE total; acceptable fallback if net total unavailable, but less preferred.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - excluding Assets Leased Out - Gross
candidates.why: Gross PPE with exclusion modifier; less preferred than main net total.

final_choice.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - excluding Assets Leased Out - Net - Total

variables.notes: Priority list prefers the standard total net PPE line, with alternate modified net PPE second.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets on the balance sheet.
Only a component/subtotal, not total assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total assets line.

candidates.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities
candidates.why: Direct match for operating cash flow / net cash from operating activities.
Statement section/header rather than the reported net operating cash flow amount.

final_choice.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities

variables.notes: Selected the explicit net operating cash flow line from the cash flow statement.
